Tang Jay Son
candidate_records_with_pir_tags.national_role: Ex-Gerakan, expelled for contesting on Bersatu ticket — PIR-09

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Dr. Ronald Kiandee
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir06_role: PRIMARY PIR-06 actor — issued Facebook statement (Nomination Day) that PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) has 'asas kukuh' (strong grounds) to remove Bersatu, after Bersatu fielded candidates vs PN partners in 8 seats. PRECURSOR signal (no formal removal notice yet).

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Wong Chia Zhen
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir09_role: Issued immediate-effect expulsion (pecat) of Tang Jay Son for contesting on Bersatu ticket — 'serious breach of party discipline / contrary to principle of loyalty'.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Asked NS voters to give PH a stronger mandate for clean/stable administration under MB Aminuddin.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Dr. Ahmad Zahid Hamidi
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Escorted BN candidates (Tok Mat-Rantau, Zaifulbahri-Chembong, Suhaimi Aini-Kota) with lion-dance procession to Dewan Seri Rembau; also GEMA@KKDW program at Felda Palong 8, Jempol.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Johari Abdul Ghani
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Escorted BN candidate Suhaimizan Bizar (Gemencheh) to Dewan Perdana Tampin on Nomination Day.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir06_role: Positioned Bersatu as sole opposition voice; key figure to watch for response to Kiandee 'asas kukuh' statement (PIR-06 next-cycle watch).

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Hamzah Zainudin
national_figures_and_pir_actors.role: Founder of Parti Wawasan Negara; PN Secretary-General
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir06_role: Wawasan contests Bersatu in 4 of the 8 Tier-4 seats (Klawang, Sikamat, Mambau, Gemas). PIR-06 watch figure.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Datuk Seri Ramlan Harun
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Confirmed 103 candidates for PRN NS 2026 (PH 36, BN 25, Bersatu 24, PN 11, 4 independents, Berjasa/Asli/PSM 1 each).

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Bujang Abu
national_figures_and_pir_actors.role: Independent candidate (withdrew); 75-yr-old street musician / ex-govt servant
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir09_role: Tarik diri (withdrew) at nomination for N13 Sikamat — failed to submit 2023 election expense report (SPR requirement). Paperwork-related; NOT a Bersatu/party withdrawal. Minor PIR-09 note.

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Fuziah
national_figures_and_pir_actors.role: PKR / PH spokesperson (quoted re: parties' right to set own strategy)
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Quoted: 'PKR, PH respect parties' right to set own strategy for N9 polls'. (Full identity not expanded in source.)

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Tan Sri Annuar Musa
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: At Port Dickson on Nomination Day; stated BN-PN will campaign together / share ceramah stage ('BN-PN akan kempen bersama, kongsi pentas ceramah').

national_figures_and_pir_actors.name: Dr Wee
national_figures_and_pir_actors.pir07_role: Stated BN-Perikatan have an 'understanding' for NS polls, NOT a merger — framed as determinant for Melaka & PRU16.
national_figures_and_pir_actors.inference_note: Headline reads 'Dr Wee'; full name Wee Ka Siong (MCA president) inferred from context — not spelled out in source text.

coalitions: Pakatan Rakyat (PR) — historical coalition (pre-PH, referenced re: 2008 Ampangan)
Kerajaan Perpaduan (Unity Government) — federal, referenced re: BN role
organizations: Majlis Tertinggi PN (PN Supreme Council) — PIR-06 critical body (grounds to remove Bersatu)
events: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 (Pilihan Raya Negeri ke-16)
Kempen PRN Negeri Sembilan (campaign period ~2 weeks)
Pelancaran Manifesto BN (24 Julai 2026, DUN Linggi) [PIR-07]
Perarakan tarian singa Rantau — Zahid escorts Tok Mat/Zaifulbahri/Suhaimi Aini to Dewan Seri Rembau (Nom Day) [PIR-07]
Ops Penamaan Calon BN Jelebu — Chennah/Pertang/Sungai Lui/Klawang to Dewan Besar Kuala Klawang (Nom Day) [PIR-07]
Ops Penamaan Calon BN Gemencheh — Johari Abdul Ghani escorts Suhaimizan Bizar to Dewan Perdana Tampin (Nom Day) [PIR-07]
Kempen Bersama BN-PN / Kongsi Pentas Ceramah — Annuar Musa statement (Port Dickson) [PIR-07]
Pecatan Tang Jay Son oleh GERAKAN (immediate-effect, Nomination Day) [PIR-09]
Kenyataan Ronald Kiandee 'asas kukuh' (Facebook post, Nomination Day) — PIR-06 PRECURSOR signal [PIR-06]
Penarikan diri Bujang Abu (N13 Sikamat) — dokumen SPR tidak lengkap [PIR-09]

issues_and_signals.issue: Isyarat pra-pembuangan Bersatu daripada PN — Kiandee 'asas kukuh' (precursor, no formal notice yet)
Bersatu vs komponen PN di 8 kerusi Tier-4 (N04,N05,N13,N14,N23,N25,N31,N34)
Disiplin komponen PN terhadap defector ke Bersatu (Gerakan pecat Tang Jay Son)
Kredibiliti calon / defector-hopper (Rafie 2018 PH -> PAS/PN, N14 Ampangan)
Peperangan mesej Day-1 N14 Ampangan (PH 'defector' vs PN 'experienced rep')
Latar belakang calon bebas — Datuk A Saravanan (N33) credibility vetting
Penarikan diri calon bebas (Bujang Abu, dokumen — bukan calon parti)
Persefahaman BN-PN (bukan penggabungan) — penentu Melaka & PRU16 (Wee)
Calon Menteri Besar diputuskan selepas PRN (BN; tidak diumum awal)
Mandat kukuh PH (Anwar) — kesinambungan pentadbiran bersih/stabil di bawah MB Aminuddin
Pencalonan semula MB Aminuddin N.13 -> N.32 (caretaker MB seat move)
Pertembungan tokoh utama (marquee fights: N01 Loke vs Siow; N27 Tok Mat vs Dr Azizul)

nomination_centres_and_venues: Dewan Besar Kuala Klawang (Jelebu) — nomination centre [PIR-07]
Wisma Majlis Bandaraya Seremban / Wisma MBS Forest Heights — nomination centre (Sikamat, Ampangan et al.) [PIR-07]
Felda Palong 8, Jempol — GEMA@KKDW program venue (Zahid) [PIR-07]

N32 Linggi: MB Aminuddin (PH-incumbent) 3-corner; 'not easy to enter a fortress'
